channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: The World Cup must pay its carbon bill
item.description: Football’s biggest tournament should fund a serious plan to measure, reduce and account for its emissions.

item.title: El-Obeid under siege by RSF: Could this be Sudan’s next el-Fasher?
item.description: UN warns of 'catastrophe' in el-Obeid after RSF atrocities in el-Fasher last year.

item.title: Israeli attacks on Gaza kill at least 6 as ‘ceasefire’ violations continue
item.description: Israeli attacks on Gaza City and Khan Younis also wounded more than 20 people, medical sources say.

item.title: USA vs Belgium – World Cup last 16: Trump, Balogun, prediction, start time
item.description: Lobbying by President Trump and a last-minute U-turn by FIFA stir controversy before the knockout match.

item.title: Why FIFA’s Balogun red card suspension after Trump call is so controversial
item.description: FIFA's unprecedented decision sparked huge furore in football world.

item.title: Scorching heat worsens suffering in Gaza’s displacement camps
item.description: Scorching heat worsens suffering in Gaza's displacement camps

item.title: ‘We have nothing to cool off with’: French heatwave exposes inequalities
item.description: As people living in low-income areas are unable to escape the heat, analysts decry the government's response.

item.title: Huge crowd joins funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei
item.description: Enormous crowds gather in Tehran for third day to mourn amid calls for revenge against the US and Israel.

item.title: Inmates and guards killed in deadly fighting at Sri Lanka prison
item.description: Inmates and guards killed in deadly fighting at Sri Lanka prison

item.title: Impeachment trial of Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte begins
item.description: Senate trial outcome could permanently bar Duterte from office, shaking her frontrunner status for the 2028 election.

item.title: UK’s Farage’s gold deal tests his populist brand as Restore Britain rises
item.description: As another far-right party gains ground, scrutiny of Farage's outside earnings challenges his anti-establishment image.

item.title: Are you older or younger than the rest of the world?
item.description: Enter the day you were born and we will place you in the lineup of all eight billion people alive today.

item.title: Philippine Vice President Duterte’s impeachment trial begins: What we know
item.description: Duterte faces charges of mishandling government funds and making threats during rift with President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.

item.title: Who is leading the race for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Golden Boot award?
item.description: Haaland's double against Brazil takes him to seven goals, the same as Mbappe and Messi at the top of the chart.

item.title: FIFA World Cup round of 16: Bracket, schedule, Portugal vs Spain prediction
item.description: Round of 16 continues as Portugal-Spain rivalry renews before USA take on Belgium.

item.title: Mexican fans proud despite World Cup exit
item.description: Mexican fans proud despite World Cup exit

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 25: England beats Mexico; Norway eliminates Brazil
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: At least 20 people killed in Sri Lanka prison clashes
item.description: More than 100 people wounded after violence broke out at a prison in Negombo on Sunday and continued on Monday.

item.title: Impeachment trial of Philippines VP Sara Duterte begins
item.description: Impeachment trial of Philippines VP Sara Duterte begins

item.title: Moment Israeli soldier hurls stun grenade into Palestinians’ car
item.description: Security camera video appears to show an Israeli soldier throwing a stun grenade into a car carrying young Palestinians.

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi makes landfall on US Pacific islands
item.description: Local authorities on Rota, part of the Northern Mariana Islands, say they have received reports of 'major damages'.

item.title: Portugal vs Spain: World Cup last 16 – Ronaldo, Yamal, start and prediction
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's Portugal face Lamine Yamal-powered Spain in an Iberian football derby in the World Cup round of 16.

item.title: China missile test draws criticism from Australia, New Zealand, Japan
item.description: Countries raise concerns after Chinese military test-launches ballistic missile from submarine in the Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Funeral procession for Iran’s slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei under way
item.description: Iranians mourn along procession route before burial in Mashhad during weeklong ceremonies.

item.title: Khamenei’s funeral procession moves through Tehran
item.description: Crowds filled the streets of Tehran as the funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, began.
